libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables or system properties are required. For the compile-failure context, update tests away from org.codehaus.janino.util.iterator; in 3.1.0 the iterator utility classes are under org.codehaus.commons.compiler.util.iterator via the transitive commons-compiler dependency.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8855 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.codehaus.janino:janino:3.1.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Optional Ant integration classes are present, but Ant is an optional/provided dependency; tests should avoid AntCompilerAdapter unless they intentionally add an Ant test dependency.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Janino is an in-process Java compiler/evaluator library; its normal APIs need no Docker image, environment variable, system property, or extra direct dependency beyond org.codehaus.janino:janino, whose required commons-compiler dependency is already transitive. The observed javac failure is due to tests importing a package removed/relocated in 3.1.0, not missing setup.
